## Threat Submission

**Package:**
**Version:**
**Type:**

### Evidence
- [ ] Link to advisory or security blog
- [ ] Verified by at least one independent source
- [ ] Package has been unpublished or patched

### Checklist
- [ ] YAML is valid
- [ ] Description is plain English (not CVE jargon)
- [ ] safe_version is correct
- [ ] Not a duplicate of an existing entry
